word: G636 - ἀποπλέω - apopléō - ap-op-leh'-o - Sail away

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποπλέω

- Transliteration: Apopleo

- Phonetic: ap-op-leh'-o

- Definition:

1. to sail away, depart by ship, set sail

- Origin: from G575 and G4126

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G4126; to set sail: - sail away.
